allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('system_name:', d['system_name']\); print\('logo:', repr\(d['logo']\)\); print\('server_address:', d['server_address']\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['data']; print\('system_name:', d['system_name']\); print\('logo length:', len\(d['logo']\)\); print\('logo start:', d['logo'][:80]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Stars:', d.get\('stargazers_count'\)\); print\('Forks:', d.get\('forks_count'\)\); print\('License:', d.get\('license',{}\).get\('spdx_id'\)\); print\('Language:', d.get\('language'\)\); print\('Topics:', d.get\('topics',[]\)\); print\('Updated:', d.get\('updated_at'\)\); print\('Open Issues:', d.get\('open_issues_count'\)\)")
